scripts.dev: export NODE_ENV=development && pnpm run chrome:ensure && pnpm run build && pnpm run start
scripts.chrome:ensure: node -e "const{existsSync}=require('fs');const p='/home/runner/.cache/puppeteer/chrome/linux-146.0.7680.153/chrome-linux64/chrome';if(!existsSync(p)){const{execSync}=require('child_process');console.log('Downloading Chrome...');execSync('/home/runner/workspace/node_modules/.pnpm/node_modules/.bin/puppeteer browsers install chrome',{stdio:'inherit',timeout:180000});console.log('Chrome ready');}else{console.log('Chrome already cached');}"
